title: Positive flow: Navigating between sections
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'MASCOTS' section. | Tap on the 'TEAMS' tab to navigate to the 'TEAMS' section. | Tap on the 'ALL-STAR' tab to navigate to the 'ALL-STAR' section.
expected_result: Successfully navigate to the 'TEAMS' section. | Successfully navigate to the 'ALL-STAR' section.

title: Negative flow: Invalid navigation
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'MASCOTS' section. | Tap on the 'TEAMS' tab to navigate to the 'TEAMS' section. | Tap on the 'ALL-STAR' tab to navigate to the 'ALL-STAR' section. | Attempt to navigate back to the 'MASCOTS' section from the 'ALL-STAR' section.
expected_result: Unable to navigate back to the 'MASCOTS' section from the 'ALL-STAR' section.

title: UI test: Mascot image interaction
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'MASCOTS' section. | Tap on a mascot image to view more detailed information about that mascot.
expected_result: Detailed information about the selected mascot is displayed.

title: Accessibility test: Screen reader interaction
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'MASCOTS' section. | Use a screen reader to interact with the navigation bar and mascot images.
expected_result: The screen reader correctly reads out the navigation bar and mascot images.

title: Usability test: Navigation bar interaction
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'MASCOTS' section. | Interact with the navigation bar by tapping on the 'TEAMS' and 'ALL-STAR' tabs.
expected_result: The navigation bar responds correctly to user interactions.

title: Regression test: Data persistence
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'MASCOTS' section. | Tap on a mascot image to view more detailed information about that mascot. | Close the app and reopen it to check if the mascot information is still available.
expected_result: The mascot information is still available when the app is reopened.
